raw.message: Die StarGames-iOS-App macht Ihr Spiel flexibler! 🚀 Jetzt holen und Slots auf dem iPhone genießen.

hook.summary: Fast-paced intro featuring the Book of Ra logo and a smiling explorer character over a mobile slot interface.
hook.visual_action: The game logo zooms in, followed by a character reveal and a smartphone displaying spinning slot reels.

scene_flow: Intro with game logo and character reveal over a fiery background.
Close-up of a smartphone showing the Book of Ra slot reels spinning.
The reels land on a high-value winning combination of explorer symbols.
Final screen with the StarGames logo and a download call-to-action.
on_screen_text: Erlaubt nach Whitelist. Teilnahme ab 18. Glücksspiel kann süchtig machen. Hilfe unter buwei.de. AGB gelten.
audience_proxy: Adult male casino enthusiasts in Germany who enjoy classic slot machine games.
